title: Crisis in Gaza: Special measures for extended family members in Gaza - Canada.ca
content:
## Crisis in Gaza: Special measures for extended family

## All available spaces have been filled
As of March 6, 2025, we received enough temporary resident visa (TRV) applications to fill the available spaces. We’re no longer
- issuing unique reference codes
- accepting new applications under these measures
Status: Closed to new applications
Cap: 5,000 TRV applications Full
Be careful of suspicious sources promising to help you leave Gaza!
Scammers may use fake phone numbers that look like ours to ask you for money. These are not agents or consultants acting on our behalf.
We’ll never ask you for payment by telephone. If someone claiming to be from IRCC requests payment this way, it's a scam!
If you’re not sure if something is a scam, you can
- learn more about fraud and how to protect yourself
- contact us to verify

## If you submitted a TRV application under these measures
We’re processing submitted TRV applications in the order we received them.
- If you submitted a TRV application before all spaces were filled , we’ll continue to process it under the special measures.
- If you submitted a TRV application but there were no more spaces available , we’ll email you about your application. Make sure you check your email regularly, including your junk or spam folders.
We’re refunding temporary resident visa application fees and biometrics fees for eligible Palestinian nationals and their family members who applied to come to Canada under the Gaza special measures for extended family.
Find out who’s eligible for a refund and how to get one .

## If you requested a unique reference code through our crisis web form, but you didn’t submit a TRV application
Requesting a unique code is not the same as submitting a TRV application.
We’re no longer accepting new TRV applications under these measures. If you did not submit a TRV application before all available spaces were filled, you won’t be able to submit one under these measures.
If you’re interested in applying to come to Canada, explore our other temporary or permanent resident immigration programs to see if there’s a program for you.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
